clinical_blockers: Blurred or cloudy vision wording, glare, halos, night-driving difficulty, lens opacity, red reflex, eye pressure, discharge, fixed three-to-six-month review, and the combined history draft remain unsupported.
The workflow must not diagnose cataract, infer complication or urgency, recommend surgery or referral, or add medicine or driving advice unless clinician-documented.
Qualified UAE clinician review has not been completed.
